scripts.docker:setup: npm run docker:cli:setup && npm run docker:functions:setup && npm run docker:web:setup
scripts.docker:cli:setup: docker-compose -f packages/cli/docker/docker-compose.yml run --rm ocr npm ci --ignore-scripts
scripts.docker:cli:lint: docker-compose -f packages/cli/docker/docker-compose.yml run --rm ocr npm run lint --workspace=@docai/cli
scripts.docker:cli:format:check: docker-compose -f packages/cli/docker/docker-compose.yml run --rm ocr npm run format:check --workspace=@docai/cli
scripts.docker:cli:test: docker-compose -f packages/cli/docker/docker-compose.yml run --rm ocr npm run test --workspace=@docai/cli
scripts.docker:cli:test:coverage: docker-compose -f packages/cli/docker/docker-compose.yml run --rm ocr npm run test:coverage --workspace=@docai/cli
scripts.docker:functions:lint: docker-compose -f packages/functions/docker/docker-compose.yml run --rm functions npm run lint --workspace=@docai/functions
scripts.docker:functions:format:check: docker-compose -f packages/functions/docker/docker-compose.yml run --rm functions npm run format:check --workspace=@docai/functions
scripts.docker:functions:test: docker-compose -f packages/functions/docker/docker-compose.yml run --rm functions npm run test --workspace=@docai/functions
scripts.docker:functions:test:coverage: docker-compose -f packages/functions/docker/docker-compose.yml run --rm functions npm run test:coverage --workspace=@docai/functions
scripts.docker:functions:start: docker-compose -f packages/functions/docker/docker-compose.yml run --rm --service-ports functions bash -c 'npm run build --workspace=@docai/functions && npm start --workspace=@docai/functions'
scripts.docker:web:setup: docker-compose -f packages/web/docker/docker-compose.yml run --rm web npm ci --ignore-scripts
scripts.docker:web:build: docker-compose -f packages/web/docker/docker-compose.yml run --rm web npm run build --workspace=@docai/web
scripts.docker:web:dev: docker-compose -f packages/web/docker/docker-compose.yml run --rm --service-ports web npm run dev --workspace=@docai/web -- --host
scripts.docker:web:lint: docker-compose -f packages/web/docker/docker-compose.yml run --rm web npm run lint --workspace=@docai/web
scripts.docker:web:format:check: docker-compose -f packages/web/docker/docker-compose.yml run --rm web npm run format:check --workspace=@docai/web
scripts.docker:web:test: docker-compose -f packages/web/docker/docker-compose.yml run --rm web npm run test --workspace=@docai/web
scripts.docker:web:test:coverage: docker-compose -f packages/web/docker/docker-compose.yml run --rm web npm run test:coverage --workspace=@docai/web
scripts.docker:web:storybook: docker-compose -f packages/web/docker/docker-compose.yml run --rm --service-ports web bash -c 'npm run build:storybook --workspace=@docai/web && npx http-server packages/web/storybook-static -p 6006 -a 0.0.0.0 --silent'
scripts.docker:web:build:storybook: docker-compose -f packages/web/docker/docker-compose.yml run --rm web npm run build:storybook --workspace=@docai/web
scripts.docker:web:test:visual: docker-compose -f packages/web/docker/docker-compose.yml run --rm playwright bash -c 'cd packages/web && npx playwright test'
scripts.docker:web:test:visual:update: docker-compose -f packages/web/docker/docker-compose.yml run --rm playwright bash -c 'cd packages/web && npx playwright test --update-snapshots'
